finding: No CI security pipeline. Public MIT-licensed template ships executable Python with no Gitleaks, Dependabot, Semgrep, CodeQL, or dependency review.
.claude/settings.json ships empty {}. No hooks; no automated guardrails. Operating laws are honor-only.
smart_search.py reviewed: clean code (json.dumps escaping for embedded JS, subprocess timeouts, proper exit codes, env-var override for paths).
Five-skill loop is unusually compact. Comparable JASON-OS systems run 15+ skills.
No formal SCOPE manifest or schema contracts. Skills self-describe in prose; /audit catches drift.
No multi-agent / sub-agent pattern. Single-conversation paradigm throughout.
scripts/hooks/ directory exists but ships zero hooks (.gitkeep only). Hook layer documented but empty.
Two-tier user-readable vs _system/ machinery split is the design pattern; cleanly executed.
Bootstrap gate inside /audit (decay analysis dormant until 10 distinct sessions). Direct instance of resolve-before-gate pattern.
Doc-to-code ratio is extremely high. ~3,500+ lines of prose; ~200 lines of executable code. Docs ARE the deliverable.
No CHANGELOG; revision history implicit in git. Acceptable for the shape.
No CONTRIBUTING.md. Opinionated personal template; PRs not solicited.
WHY-with-WHAT discipline consistent. Every operating law has rationale. Every design choice has a reason.
Lineage transparency: ARCHITECTURE.md spends ~700 words on multi-year evolution from custom GPTs to current loop.
Dual-mode docs — README readable as install steps OR pasteable into Claude as walkthrough instructions.
No automated tests. Acceptable for prose-instruction template; behavior verified by lived sessions.
No release/version checkpoint. Operators cloning today vs. six months from now get different state.

This analysis pass initially defaulted past Coverage Audit on relevance grounds — dismissed 4 artifacts (notion-vs-obsidian.md, notion-vs-obsidian-deep.md, obsidian-setup.md Layers 4-5, CREDITS.md) as 'low relevance to home repo.' User reversed every skip and read the artifacts: they contained the highest-value insights. Triggered SKILL.md v1.1 hard-gating of Coverage Audit + new feedback memory feedback_repo_analysis_read_by_default.md.

SKILL.md Phase 6 (Value Map) describes 4 candidate types (pattern / knowledge / content / anti-pattern) but the JASON-OS analysisRecord schema (scripts/lib/analysis-schema.js) prunes 'anti-pattern' and 'content' per PORT_DECISIONS.md Batch 2. SKILL.md text not updated. Recommended fix: align SKILL.md Phase 6 prose with schema (note 6 valid types: pattern, knowledge, architecture-pattern, design-principle, workflow-pattern, tool) and route anti-patterns into Creator View §6 only. Deferred for future SKILL.md edit pass.
